name: Rice Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the bell peppers into 1-inch julienne strips.
2. In a large skillet over medium heat, melt the butter or margarine.
3. Add the sliced mushrooms and green onions. Cook until the mushrooms are golden brown and the onions are translucent, about 5 minutes.
4. Stir in the rice, salt, sage, and 2/3 cup water. Stir to combine.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until all liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender.
6. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining 1/3 cup of water and parsley.
